/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/main.cc.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/ChatServer.cc.o CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/Router.cc.o "CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/home/michael-377/桌面/chatroom/protocal/pack.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/chat_server.dir/home/michael-377/桌面/chatroom/protocal/unpack.cpp.o" -o chat_server   -L/home/michael-377/build/release-install-cpp11/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/michael-377/build/release-install-cpp11/lib -lmuduo_net -lmuduo_base -ljsoncpp -lpthread
